Iconography

Iconography

The Voyadores icon system includes a 1361-icon font in Regular and Solid weights, plus 71 SVG and PNG asset icons for banks, agencies, locations, and file types.

1361+Icon Font Icons
2Weights
71SVG / PNG Assets
5Asset Sets

Icon Font — Usage

<!-- Regular weight -->
<i class="vi-regular vi-home"></i>

<!-- Solid weight -->
<i class="vi-solid vi-home"></i>

<!-- Custom size -->
<i class="vi-regular vi-settings" style="font-size:2rem"></i>

All Icons

1361

No icons found.

SVG Icon Sets

Asset icons are served from the CDN and used directly as <img> tags or background images. Click Copy URL to copy the full CDN path, or Download to save the file.
